title: PPL Hodgepodge
description: Random compilation of Pixel Perfection's blocks, items and entities, retextured.
body:
Try my new Texture pack **Pixel Perfection Fidelity**

This resourcepack changes random **blocks**, **items** and **entities** in [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) texture pack (_view gallery for more input_). # _Some of the textures depicted belong to my other pack [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui)_ # FEATURES SUPPORTED: - No Pumpkin Blur - 2D items for some blocks - More Pixeled Entity Shadow - Animated item textures - Random textures for some blocks - Painting preview tooltips - Custom larger saplings - Custom textures for buckets of axolotls depending on their color - Vanilla-like textures for Piglin, Piglin Brute, Zombified Piglin, Hoglin, and Zoglin - 3D Iron Door & Trapdoor - 3D Copper Doors & Trapdoors - (Reimagined) Tinted Glass, Stained Glass, and Stained Glass Panes (_with support for connected textures_) (_Requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)_) - No coal on Campfire if unlit - Hopper Arrows - Forward port of some blocks & items from older versions # DEPENDENCIES - [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) (REQUIRED) - [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) (RECOMMENDED) - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (RECOMMENDED) - [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (OPTIONAL) - [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) (OPTIONAL) - [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui) (OPTIONAL) # **MY OTHER PACKS** - [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity) - [Pixel Perfection x FARMER'S DELIGHT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixelperfectionxfarmersdelight) - [Pixel Perfection x THE TWILIGHT FOREST](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-the-twilight-forest) - [Pixel Perfection x AD ASTRA](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-ad-astra) - [Pixel Perfection x DEHYDRATION](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-dehydration) - [Pixel Perfection x CONTROLIFY](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-controlify) - [PPL Compat Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-compatibility-pack) - [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui) - [PPL Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-better-grass) - [PPL Custom Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-custom-theme-for-jade)
